title: eclipta patula
intro: Eclipta patula, also known as False Daisy or Eclipta, is a flowering plant native to Asia and North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Eclipta patula include promoting hair growth, reducing stress and anxiety, and supporting liver health. In herbal preparations, Eclipta patula is often used as a tea, tincture, or oil, and is also added to skincare products to promote healthy hair and scalp.
